description: ManaBuy MCP server for product search, order quote, and AI-assisted ordering.
name: io.github.ManaBuyTeam/manabuy-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the ManaBuy API.
environmentVariables.name: MANABUY_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Currency header used for product and order requests.
environmentVariables.name: MANABUY_CURRENCY

environmentVariables.description: Language header used by ManaBuy API responses.
environmentVariables.name: MANABUY_LANG

environmentVariables.description: Business channel header and default order channel.
environmentVariables.name: MANABUY_BIZ_CHANNEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional user-scoped ManaBuy authentication token for order operations. Browser login can also be started with the login_manabuy tool.
environmentVariables.name: MANABUY_AUTH_TOKEN

title: ManaBuy MCP Server
